meaning: v.掠夺,抢劫,劫掠n.掠夺物,战利品,抢劫
examples: Hubbard and his followers cruised the Mediterranean searching for loot that he had stored in previous lifetimes.
The thieves divides the loot into equal shares.
But others can and do attempt to cash in on the loot.
He now faces jail time for the forgery, and of course lost out on the loot.
Some of Orton's works included Entertaining Mr Sloane, Loot and What The Butler Saw.
